title: Witney swelters as temperatures hit 34°C
summary: High temperatures have swept across Witney as residents are urged to stay hydrated during the hottest afternoon of the year.
body: Temperatures across Witney climbed to 34°C this afternoon as intense sunshine gripped the town centre.
Despite the unusually hot conditions, the Met Office has not issued any weather warnings for Oxfordshire.
Residents are being advised to drink plenty of water, avoid prolonged sun exposure, and check in on vulnerable neighbours, relatives and friends during the hottest part of the day.
author: Witney Wire Newsdesk

title: Community festival weekend expected to draw crowds
summary: Music, food stalls, family activities and local performers are planned for a busy weekend of events.
body: Organisers say this year's community festival will bring together local businesses, performers, charities and families for a packed programme across the weekend.
author: Events Desk

title: Roadworks set to affect town centre traffic
summary: Drivers are being warned to allow extra time as resurfacing and maintenance work begins.
body: Temporary traffic management will be in place while essential maintenance is carried out. Residents are advised to check routes before travelling.
author: Travel Reporter

title: Local club celebrates dramatic final victory
summary: A late winner secured silverware after a tense final watched by travelling supporters.
body: The team lifted the trophy after a hard-fought match that stayed level until the closing minutes. Coaches praised the players' resilience and the support from the community.
author: Sports Desk

title: School launches new wildlife garden
summary: Pupils helped plant flowers, herbs and small trees as part of a nature and wellbeing project.
body: Teachers say the project will help children learn about biodiversity, food growing and outdoor wellbeing throughout the school year.
author: Community Reporter

title: Independent café opens with focus on local suppliers
summary: A new café has opened in Witney, offering seasonal food and coffee from regional suppliers.
body: The owners say they want the café to become a friendly meeting place for residents, workers and visitors.
author: Business Desk

title: Carterton Arts Week gets underway across the town
summary: Workshops, exhibitions and craft sessions are now taking place across Carterton as Arts Week returns for another year.
body: Workshops, exhibitions and craft sessions are now taking place across Carterton as Arts Week returns for another year.
The event runs until 7 June and includes painting sessions, sewing workshops and community arts activities across the town.
Local artists and community groups are taking part throughout the week.
author: Witney Wire Newsdesk
